Title: Swell Sessions at The Scarborough | Outdoor Cinema Fundraiser
Event_Description: The Scarborough Hotel presents [Swell Sessions at The Scarborough | Outdoor Cinema Fundraiser](https://www.eventbrite.com.au/e/swell-sessions-at-the-scarborough-outdoor-cinema-fundraiser-tickets-1987794962242?aff=ebdssbdestsearch), an outdoor cinema fundraiser featuring surf films and discussions to support a thriving ocean.

Title: Uniting Business Live Australia Sustainability in Action
Event_Description: [Uniting Business Live Australia Sustainability in Action](https://www.unaansw.org.au/donate) is a sustainability-focused event organised by the United Nations Association of Australia (NSW Division) to promote awareness and action on global challenges.

Title: 2nd National Dialogue on Long-Term Climate Strategy in Brazil
Event_Description: [2nd National Dialogue on Long-Term Climate Strategy in Brazil](https://hub.wri.org/events/2026/5/2nd-national-dialogue-long-term-climate-strategy-brazil?returnTo=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wri.org%2Fevents) organized by WRI Brasil as part of the 2050 is Now project, focusing on Brazil’s long-term climate strategy and inclusive decarbonization.

Title: Saving Lives in a Warming World: Investing in Climate Services for Health
Event_Description: [Saving Lives in a Warming World: Investing in Climate Services for Health](https://hub.wri.org/events/2026/5/saving-lives-warming-world-investing-climate-services-health?returnTo=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wri.org%2Fevents) online webinar hosted by World Resources Institute on climate services for health and their scale.

Title: The State of Forests in 2025 and Why it Matters for 2026
Event_Description: [The State of Forests in 2025 and Why it Matters for 2026](https://hub.wri.org/events/2026/5/state-forests-2025-and-why-it-matters-2026?returnTo=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wri.org%2Fevents) is a webinar hosted by Rod Taylor (WRI) and Global Forest Watch, examining 2025 forest trends and 2026 priorities.

Title: EVENT | 14 May: A2EP Member Update + networking drinks - Melbourne
Event_Description: [EVENT | 14 May: A2EP Member Update + networking drinks - Melbourne](https://www.a2ep.org.au/post/event-14-may-a2ep-member-update-networking-drinks-melbourne) invites A2EP members to attend, in-person in Melbourne or online, for member updates and networking.

Title: IMPACT project: Informational webinar on the second call for applications
Event_Description: [IMPACT project: Informational webinar on the second call for applications](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/impact-project-informational-webinar-on-the-second-call-for-applications.html) is a virtual webinar organized by OECD and DG REGIO about the IMPACT project and the second call for applications.

Title: Launch of the Longevity Readiness Tool
Event_Description: Join [Launch of the Longevity Readiness Tool](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/launch-of-the-longevity-readiness-tool0.html), a hybrid OECD and AARP event showcasing the tool to help organisations prepare for longer working lives.

Title: The Future of Development Co-operation
Event_Description: [The Future of Development Co-operation](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/the-future-of-international-development-co-operation.html) is a hybrid conference organised by OECD, focusing on strategic directions for international development co-operation.

Title: Industry Decarbonisation in Times of Energy Crises
Event_Description: The OECD Berlin Centre presents [Industry Decarbonisation in Times of Energy Crises](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/industry-decarbonisation-in-times-of-energy-crises.html) as part of the DIW-OECD Industrial Strategy Dialogues, addressing decarbonisation and international cooperation in industry.

Title: Industry Decarbonisation in Times of Energy Crises
Event_Description: [Industry Decarbonisation in Times of Energy Crises](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/04/industry-decarbonisation-in-times-of-energy-crises.html) is organised by OECD and examines broad issues around decarbonising industry amid energy crises.

Title: OECD/ICGN Webinar on Capital Market Service Providers
Event_Description: [OECD/ICGN Webinar on Capital Market Service Providers](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/oecdicgn-webinar-on-capital-market-service-providers.html) online, organised by OECD and ICGN to discuss the OECD report on capital market service providers in corporate governance.

Title: Who learns? Mapping the many faces of adult learners
Event_Description: [Who learns? Mapping the many faces of adult learners](https://www.oecd.org/en/events/2026/05/who-learns-mapping-the-many-faces-of-adult-learners.html) — a virtual OECD webinar identifying adult learner profiles to inform lifelong learning policies.

Title: Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 - QLD (Day 1)
Event_Description: [Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 – QLD (Day 1)](https://www.governanceinstitute.com.au/events/e09666-governance-and-risk-management-forum-2026-qld-day-1/) is an in-person forum by Governance Institute of Australia focusing on governance and risk management and organisational resilience.

Title: Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 - QLD
Event_Description: [Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 – QLD](https://www.governanceinstitute.com.au/events/e09665-governance-and-risk-management-forum-2026-qld/) organised by Governance Institute of Australia, a two-day event on governance, risk management and organisational resilience.

Title: Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 - QLD (Day 2)
Event_Description: The Governance Institute of Australia presents [Governance and Risk Management Forum 2026 – QLD (Day 2)](https://www.governanceinstitute.com.au/events/e09667-governance-and-risk-management-forum-2026-qld-day-2/) focusing on embedding resilience in governance and risk management, in-person in Brisbane.

Title: First Nations Young Directors Masterclass
Event_Description: [First Nations Young Directors Masterclass](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/wa/EVNT-001124.html) is organised by the Australian Institute of Company Directors (AICD) in partnership with Garlett Group and offers a practical introduction to board roles for young First Nations people.

Title: Tech Governance Forum 2026
Event_Description: The Australian Institute of Company Directors presents [Tech Governance Forum 2026](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/qld/EVNT-001054.html), a hybrid event focusing on tech governance, cybersecurity and AI through real-world case studies.

Title: Tech Governance Forum 2026 - Virtual
Event_Description: [Tech Governance Forum 2026](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/online/EVNT-001055.html) is organised by the Australian Institute of Company Directors and covers tech governance topics in a virtual format.

Title: Brisbane Directors Workshop: Finding Board Positions
Event_Description: [Brisbane Directors’ Workshop: Finding Board Positions](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/qld/EVNT-001122.html) The Australian Institute of Company Directors hosts this workshop to help members prepare for director roles and board recruitment.

Title: Melbourne Directors Workshop: Finding Board Positions
Event_Description: [Melbourne Directors’ Workshop: Finding Board Positions](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/vic/EVNT-001119.html) by the Australian Institute of Company Directors, focusing on preparing for board roles and the director recruitment process (in-person and virtual).

Title: Ballarat Directors Briefing: Thinking Talking About Risk for Effective Governance
Event_Description: [Ballarat Directors’ Briefing: Thinking & Talking About Risk for Effective Governance](https://www.aicd.com.au/events/all-events/vic/EVNT-001184.html) is organised by AICD and focuses on risk governance discussions for directors in Ballarat (in-person briefing).

Title: People Planet Pint and The Circular Economy Club present Waste'a'thon
Event_Description: [Waste'a'thon](https://www.eventbrite.com.au/e/people-planet-pint-and-the-circular-economy-club-present-wasteathon-tickets-1983426734756?aff=ebdssbdestsearch) is an in-person event by People Planet Pint and Circular Economy Club focusing on tackling waste and advancing circular economy ideas.

Title: Q1 2026 review - ABN AMRO Boston Common Emerging  Markets ESG Equities…
Event_Description: ABN AMRO Investment Solutions presents a live ESG webcast: [Q1 2026 review - ABN AMRO Boston Common Emerging Markets ESG Equities…](https://www.brighttalk.com/webcast/19313/665917?size=10&rank=-webcast_relevance&duration=0..&contentType=webcast&q=esg) covering a quarterly review of emerging markets ESG equities.
